topic_text: When Temperature drops below from SmartThings, do Set temperature using Nest Thermostat. Set nest based on sensor temp. Sets Nest thermostat based on value of multisensor temperature reading

When Temperature drops below from Netatmo Weather Station, do Set to manual mode using Netatmo Thermostat. Lounge is less than 19C. If lounge temperature falls below 19C increase netatmo thromostat to 20C for 2 hours

When Current temperature drops below from Weather Underground, do Turn on using WeMo Insight Switch. Create a thermostat with outside temperature. A WeMo Insight Switch Heater turn on, when curent temperature drops below --- ÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂ°C

When Current humidity level rises above from Weather Underground, do Turn on using WeMo Insight Switch. Above 80% humidity, turn on dehumidifier.. Make sure your zip is selected for the humidity forecast.
When Current condition changes to from Weather Underground, do Turn on using WeMo Insight Switch. Rain & Wemo. Turns on wemo lights if it's raining.

When Current condition changes to from Weather Underground, do Turn on using WeMo Insight Switch. Turn lights on if rainy. This Applet will turn on any lights connected to a Wemo switch when it's rainy
When Current temperature drops below from Weather Underground, do Turn on using WeMo Smart Plug. Turn on bedroom heater. Turn on heater
When Current temperature drops below from Weather Underground, do Turn on using WeMo Smart Plug. Wemo Heater. Heater turns on when temprature drops below 15deg
When Current temperature drops below from Weather Underground, do Turn on using WeMo Smart Plug. Turn Heater ON, Temp Drops below 32 degrees.. For Space Heater
When Current temperature drops below from Weather Underground, do Turn on using WeMo Smart Plug. Turn on heater. Choose the weather channel in your city
When Current condition changes to from Weather Underground, do Turn on using WeMo Smart Plug. Turn on outdoor Xmas lights when it snows. Xmas lights always look better when it is snowing
When Current condition changes to from Weather Underground, do Turn on using WeMo Smart Plug. Turn light on if Raining. works with wemo

When Indoor temperature less than from ecobee, do Turn off using WeMo Light Switch. Turn the ceiling fan off when temperature falls. Well keep the ceiling fan from cooking you off when it isn't needed.

When Indoor temperature greater than from ecobee, do Turn on using WeMo Smart Plug. Turn on wemo switch with temperature from ecobee. I use this to control a wemo switch that then controls my window AC unitThe AC unit must have the recovery from power outage feature and I set the unit to a very low temperature.You will want the turn off rule also - https://ifttt.com/Applets/386405-turn-off-wemo-switch-with-temperature-from-ecobee

When Temperature drops below from ThermoSmart, do Turn off using WeMo Smart Plug. Turn off your lights when temperature drops below.... Turn off your lights when the measured temperature of your ThermoSmart drops below a certain threshold.

When Current temperature rises above from Weather Underground, do Turn AC unit on using Daikin Online Controller. Use the Daikin controller to switch your A/C unit to cooling mode when it's hot. Automatically turn on your Daikin AC unit in Cooling mode when the outdoor temperature rises above a certain point.

When Current temperature drops below from Weather Underground, do Turn on using D-Link Smart Plug. If current temperature drops below , then turn on D-Link Smart Plug.. If current temperature drops below , then turn on D-Link Smart Plug.

When Current condition changes to from Weather Underground, do Turn on using D-Link Smart Plug. If current condition changes to, then turn on D-Link Smart Plug.. If current condition changes to, then turn on D-Link Smart Plug.

When Current temperature drops below from Weather Underground, do Power off device using Energenie Mi|Home. Switch your Mi|Home adapter OFF when the temperature falls below 10ÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂ°C. The socket will switch OFF whenever the temperature in your area drops below a certain amount
When Current condition changes to from Weather Underground, do Turn on using WeMo Insight Switch. If it snows, turn on roof heater. If it starts to snow, turn on the roof heating cable automatically.

When Current humidity level rises above from Weather Underground, do Turn on a device using Telldus Live!. If outdoor weather data rises humidity above 65%, then toggle switch in telldus live. type in your desired humidity

When Current pollen count rises above from Weather Underground, do Set operation mode to using Samsung Air Purifier. Automatically set your Samsung Air Purifier to High when the pollen count rises. If the current pollen count hits 10 or more, your Air Purifier will get straight to workBreathe easy!

When Current humidity level rises above from Weather Underground, do Set operation mode using Samsung Floor Air Conditioner. Set operation mode to Dry, when humidity level reaches the value you specify. Set operation mode to Dry, when humidity level reaches the value you specify

When Current humidity level rises above from Weather Underground, do Set operation mode using Samsung Room Air Conditioner. Turn on A/C if humidity rises above a certain %. Set operation mode to Dry, when humidity level reaches the value you specify

When Current temperature rises above from Weather Underground, do Turn A/C on using Sensibo. When it's steaming hot outside, switch the air conditioner on using Sensibo. When the temperature outside is boiling hot, it's time to start cooling your house using Sensibo
When Current temperature drops below from Weather Underground, do Turn A/C on using Sensibo. Up Unit on if Temp < 45. If too cold, turns ac on before pipes freeze

When Current temperature drops below from Weather Underground, do Switch on using SmartThings. Icy Weather Alert for Samsung SmartThings. The Applet will trigger an output on your Samsung Smart things when the local weather conditions get to a point where there may be a risk of ice forming on roads  It is deliberately not set to zero, as local topology may mean some area are colder than your local weather station is reporting, due to wind chill, or  shade preventing ice that formed overnight melting
When Temperature rises above from SmartThings, do Turn A/C off using Sensibo. Turn heat off at 75 degrees. Use  Smartthings sensor as a thermostat

When Temperature drops below from SmartThings, do Turn A/C off using Sensibo. Sensibo-Smarthings AC Temp Sensor Off. You can adjust the room temperature so if it drops below a level the AC unit switches off

When Temperature rises above from ThermoSmart, do Turn on using WeMo Smart Plug. If the room is warm, switch on the bedlight. Want to get up after your living room has heated to a comfortable level? Set a temperature for the livingroom and let Wemo switch on the bedlight when this temperature is realised by ThermoSmart

When Temperature rises above from ThermoSmart, do Turn on using WeMo Smart Plug. Turn on your lights when temperature rises above.... Turn on your lights when the measured temperature of your ThermoSmart rises above a certain threshold.
When Temperature rises above from SmartThings, do Turn on using WeMo Smart Plug. Turn on Window AC unit when temp reaches certain level in room. Using Smartthings multipurpose sensor and wemo outlet

When Current temperature rises above from Weather Underground, do Turn on using WeMo Smart Plug. If temperature rises above 69 then turn on cooler.. I have a great window evaporative cooler (also known as swamp cooler) in my house, but the only control it has is fan speed and cooling pump on/off - using this Applet combined with another acts as a thermostat for the cooler No more cold nights when I forget to switch it off, or warm mornings when I don't turn it on early enough.
When Current temperature rises above from Weather Underground, do Turn on using WeMo Smart Plug. Fan on when temp rises above 70ÃÂÃÂÃÂÃÂ°F #temp. Change the temperature (or location) as needed

When Current temperature drops below from Weather Underground, do Turn on using WeMo Smart Plug. Freeze protection system purge.. When the temperature drops to freezing, this triggers an air purge system to blow out liquid lines.
When Current temperature drops below from Weather Underground, do Turn on using WeMo Smart Plug. Turn on calefaction. Turn on your electric calefactor connected to wemo switch

When Current temperature rises above from Weather Underground, do Turn on using WeMo Insight Switch. Turn on the AC if it is too hot.. Turns on a window AC unit controlled by a WeMo Insight if the outside temperature gets too warm Keeps the kitty cool.

When Current temperature drops below from Weather Underground, do Turn on using WeMo Insight Switch. Turn on heater when temperature drops below certain degree. Adjust the temperature and setup IFTTT weather channel, make sure the location is setEnjoy!

When Moisture detected from SmartThings, do Switch on using SmartThings. Turn on sump pump when water detected. I use a GE plug to turn on a sump pump when water is detected (not moisture--I'm using an Everspring flood sensor)
When Temperature drops below from SmartThings, do Switch off using SmartThings. if Temp too low, turn outlet. I use this to turn off my dehumidifier if the temp drops below 47 degrees.

When Humidity rises above from SmartThings, do Turn on using WeMo Smart Plug. Using your Ecobee Thermostat to Trigger a dehumidifier.. I've got an Ecobee thermostat and on some days it's not hot but it is humid If the house gets too humid using a link to Smartthings I can trigger a basement humidifier to turn on.

When Temperature rises above from Wink: Spotter, do Turn A/C on using Sensibo. If spotter temperature rises turn on the A/C using Sensibo. Use Wink's spotter to start cooling your home with SensiboWhen the temperature rises above a certain level, start your air conditioner.
When Temperature rises above from Wink: Spotter, do Turn on using WeMo Smart Plug. House Above (--)*F, AC_ON. Wink Spotter & WeMo
When Temperature rises above from Wink: Spotter, do Turn on using WeMo Smart Plug. House Above (--)*F, AC_On. Wink Spotter & WeMo

When Temperature is too high from Wireless Tag, do Turn A/C on using Sensibo. Switch on AC with Sensibo when Wireless Tag temperature is too high.. Use your Wireless Tag temperature range setting to control your AC with Sensibo.

When Temperature is too low from Wireless Tag, do Turn A/C off using Sensibo. Switch off AC using Sensibo when Wireless Tag temperature is too low.. Use your Wireless Tag temperature range setting to control your AC with Sensibo.
When Switched on from WeMo Smart Plug, do Set temperature using ThermoSmart. Switch on the light and ThermoSmart in one go. If you switch on the Wemo the temperature is set to 20dgC

When Temperature drops below from Netatmo Weather Station, do Turn on using WeMo Insight Switch. If temperature drops, turn on WeMo Insight - anythings.co. If temperature drops, turn on WeMo Insight - anythings.co
